name: Xata
description: Monitor Xata serverless database workspaces for infrastructure and access compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Xata at https://app.xata.io
2. Go to Account Settings → Personal API keys
3. Generate a new API key
4. Copy and enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Xata Account Settings → Personal API keys

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists Xata workspaces for serverless database infrastructure inventory

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Xata workspace members and their database access permissions
